Given the contradiction in his claims, he is the most likely candidate for the Werewolf.

parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player because he contradicts his own claims. He initially stated he was a Villager, but later claimed to be the Seer who saw a Werewolf and a Troublemaker in the center. This sudden shift in identity is a common bluffing tactic used by Werewolves to avoid detection or to manipulate the group into a Circle Vote.
